calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Feb-25-2020 Discharged

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Sydney E. Fairbairn, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, PEPPERDINE UNIVERSITY.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) GABRIEL K. JENKINS.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $11,500.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,769.39
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $461.50
Other: Costs authorized Under 37 CFR 674. $5,197.18
Total Judgment in the amount of $18,928.07
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2014 Continued To Oct-07-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
